description: The Legacy Video Player component is used to construct and control legacy video players.

fields.StereoLayout: The layout of the stereo audio for the video player.
fields.SizeCompensation: How to compensate for video size.
fields.videoProvider: The video provider component giving the audio and visual data for the video.
fields._style: The legacy ui style component being used for this video player.
fields._indicatorTextureUrl: The field to drive to control the video player's texture url
fields._indicatorTint: The field to drive to control the video player's indictor's tint
fields._colliderSize: The field to drive to control the video player's collider size
fields._frameWidth: The field to drive to control the video player's border frame width
fields._frameHeight: The field to drive to control the video player's border frame height
fields._frameMaterial: The field to drive to control the video player's frame material
fields._displayMaterial: This stores the video player's display material.
fields._displayMaterialTexture: The field to drive to control the video player's display material texture.
fields._displaySize: The field to drive to control the video player's display section size.
fields._mainAudioOutput: This stores the video player's main audio output.
fields._timelineSlider: This stores the video player's timeline slider.
fields._timelinePosition: The field to drive to control the video player's timeline playhead position.
fields._timelineWidth: The field to drive to control the video player's timeline ui width.
fields._positionDrive: The field to drive to control the video player's ui position.
fields._volumeSlider: This stores the video player's volume slider.
fields._volumePosition: The field to drive to control the video player's volume amount.
fields._volumeWidth: The field to drive to control the video player's volume ui width.
fields._volumeDrive: The field to drive to control the video player's volume for the audio output component.
fields._buttonsWidth: The field to drive to control the video player's button container widths.
fields._buttonsHeight: The field to drive to control the video player's button container height.
fields._buttonsPosition: The field to drive to control the video player's button container position.
fields._playButtonColor: The field to drive to control the video player's play button color.
fields._pauseButtonColor: The field to drive to control the video player's pause button color.
fields._stopButtonColor: The field to drive to control the video player's stop button color.
fields._loopButtonColor: The field to drive to control the video player's loop button color.
fields._audio3DButtonColor: The field to drive to control the video player's 3d audio button.
fields._exportable: The component that is used to make this video player exportable.
fields._assetProxy: The component that is used to allow this video to be dropped into asset fields for videos.
fields._referenceProxy: The component that allows this video to be dropped into texture and audio fields or receivers.

methods.OnIndicatorTouched: Called when the indicator button is touched.
methods.OnPlayTouched: Called when the play button is touched.
methods.OnPauseTouched: Called when the pause button is touched.
methods.OnStopTouched: Called when the stop button is touched.
methods.OnLoopTouched: Called when the loop button is touched.
methods.OnAudio3DTouched: Called when the spatialize audio button is touched.
methods.VolumeUp: Called when the volume up button is touched.
methods.VolumeDown: Called when the volume down button is touched.
methods.FastForward: Called when the fast forward button is touched.
methods.FastBackward: Called when the fast backwards button is touched.

usage: Used in legacy content. do not use in new content.
